name: Add Draw Navigation Persistence Fix
user_facing_result: Бутонът 'Добави нов тираж' вече отваря страницата чрез устойчиво навигационно състояние и не трябва да връща към 'Потребителско меню' при въвеждане на числата.

checks.check: sidebar shortcut stores pending navigation group
checks.details: Shortcut does not render the page directly after sidebar widgets are already created.

checks.check: sidebar shortcut stores pending add-draw page
checks.details: Next rerun opens the add-draw page through normal navigation state.

checks.check: navigation group selectbox has stable key
checks.details: The selected main section persists across Streamlit reruns.
The selected page persists while the user types in draw input fields.

checks.check: choice is mirrored in session state
checks.details: Other app layers can still read the current selected page.
